---
title: "Overall Data Summary"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r include = F}
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
library(gtExtras)
library(gt)
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") { # local version
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")
} else if (user == "rameshsh") { # hyak version
  root_path <- ""
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/rameshsh/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") { # hyak version
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/pylell/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
harm_dat_raw <- read.csv(file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization/Data Clean/soma_harmonized_dataset.csv"), na = "")
```

```{r, include = F}
harm_dat <- harm_dat_raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(sex = case_when(study == "ULTRA" ~ "Male", T ~ sex)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-starts_with("seq"), seq.10000.28, seq.10000.28_urine)

harm_dat_recid <- harm_dat %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(record_id, visit)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-mrn, -dob)  %>%
  filter(visit %nin% c("treatment_period_1", "treatment_period_2",
                       "treatment_period_3", "treatment_period_4", 
                       "Early Withdrawal", "Unscheduled 1", "Unscheduled 2")) %>%
  bind_rows(data.frame(study = c(rep("ADAPT-CKD", 2),
                                 rep("MANATEE", 1),
                                 rep("INSPIRE", 1),
                                 rep("SUGAR-N-SALT", 1),
                                 rep("T1-DISCO", 1),
                                 rep("MetMod", 1),
                                 rep("OTTER", 1),
                                 rep("MANGO", 1)),
                       visit = c("MO6", "YR1", 
                                 "MO4",
                                 "MO3", 
                                 "YR3",
                                 "MO6",
                                 "MO6",
                                 "MO6",
                                 "YR1"),
                       group = c("Type 2 Diabetes", "Obese Control",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes",
                                 "Type 2 Diabetes",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes",
                                 "Obese Control"))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(study_design = case_when(study %in% c("RENAL-HEIR", "RENAL-HEIRitage", "PENGUIN",
                                                      "CROCODILE", "SWEETHEART", "CASPER") ~ "Observational: Cross-sectional",
                                         study %in% c("ULTRA", "COFFEE") ~ "Interventional: Longitudinal",
                                         study %in% c("PANTHER") ~ "Observational: Accelerated Longitudinal",
                                         study %in% c("ADAPT-CKD", "PANDA", "MANGO", "IMPROVE") ~ "Observational: Longitudinal",
                                         study %in% c("ATTEMPT", "RPC2", "MANATEE", "T1-DISCO", "MetMod", 
                                                      "OTTER", "SUGAR-N-SALT", "INSPIRE") ~ "Interventional: RCT"),
                exposure_design = case_when(study %in% c("COFFEE", "ULTRA", "ATTEMPT", "INSPIRE", "MANATEE", "MetMod",
                                                         "OTTER", "RPC2", "SUGAR-N-SALT", "T1-DISCO") ~ "Interventional",
                                            T ~ "Observational"),
                design_struc = case_when(study %in% c("COFFEE", "ULTRA", "ATTEMPT", "INSPIRE", "MANATEE", "MetMod",
                                                      "OTTER", "RPC2", "SUGAR-N-SALT", "T1-DISCO", "ADAPT-CKD",
                                                      "IMPROVE", "MANGO", "PANDA") ~ "Longitudinal",
                                         study == "PANTHER" ~ "Accelerated Longitudinal",
                                         T ~ "Cross-Sectional"),
                study_design_sub = case_when(study %in% c("ATTEMPT", "INSPIRE", "MANATEE", "MetMod", "OTTER", "RPC2", 
                                                          "SUGAR-N-SALT", "T1-DISCO") ~ "RCT",
                                             study %in% c("COFFEE", "ULTRA") ~ "Single-arm trial",
                                             study %in% c("IMPROVE", "MANGO", "ADAPT-CKD") ~ "Registry cohort",
                                             study %in% c("PANTHER") ~ "Prospective cohort", 
                                             T ~ "Cohort characterization"),
                visit = case_when(visit == "screening" ~ "baseline",
                                  study == "ATTEMPT" & visit == "follow_up" ~ "4_months_post",
                                  is.na(visit) & study_design == "Cross-sectional" ~ "baseline",
                                  is.na(visit) ~ "follow up",
                                  T ~ visit),
                intervention = case_when(study == "COFFEE" ~ "Caffeine (205mg/day)",
                                         study == "IMPROVE" ~ "Bariatric Surgery (VSG)",
                                         study == "MANGO" ~ "Bariatric Surgery (VSG)",
                                         study == "ULTRA" ~ "Pegloticase (Krystexxa 8mg/once)",
                                         study == "ATTEMPT" ~ "SGLT2i (Dapagliflozin 5mg/day)",
                                         study == "RPC2" ~ "SGLT2i (Canagliflozin 10mg/day)",
                                         study == "MANATEE" ~ "AID System + Metformin (2000mg/day)",
                                         study == "INSPIRE" ~ "IMST (75% PImax, 30 breaths/day, 6 days/wk)",
                                         study == "SUGAR-N-SALT" ~ "SGLT2i (Sotagliflozin 200mg/day)",
                                         study == "T1-DISCO" ~ "GLP-1RA (Semaglutide 1mg/week)",
                                         study == "MetMod" ~ "AMX0035 (Phenylbutyrate + TUDCA)",
                                         study == "ADAPT-CKD" ~ "SGLT2i, GLP-1RA, OR ns-MRA",
                                         study == "OTTER" ~ "ns-MRA (Finerenone 20mg/day)")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_design)) %>%
  filter(study != "RPC2" | visit != "follow up") 


# Deidentify data for LLM
# harm_dat_recid <- harm_dat_recid[, !grepl("date", names(harm_dat_recid), ignore.case = TRUE)]
# write.csv(harm_dat_recid, file.path(root_path, "Ye Ji Choi/harm_data_deidentified_022326.csv"), row.names = F, na = "")
```

```{r}
# ── Vitals & Anthropometrics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
vitals_anthropometrics <- c(
  "age",              # Age (years)
  "sex",              # Sex
  "race",             # Race
  "ethnicity",        # Ethnicity
  "height",           # Height (cm)
  "weight",           # Weight (kg)
  "bmi",              # BMI (kg/m²)
  "sbp",              # Systolic Blood Pressure (mmHg)
  "dbp",              # Diastolic Blood Pressure (mmHg)
  "map",              # Mean Arterial Pressure (mmHg)
  "pulse",            # Pulse (bpm)
  "waistcm",          # Waist circumference (cm)
  "hipcm",            # Hip circumference (cm)
  "waist_hip_ratio",  # Waist/hip ratio
  "diabetes_duration" # Diabetes duration (months)
)


# ── Urine Labs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
urine_labs <- c(
  "creatinine_u",       # Urine Creatinine (mg/dL)
  "microalbumin_u",     # Urine Microalbumin (mcg/mL)
  "acr_u",              # Urine Albumin-Creatinine Ratio / UACR (mg/g)
  "elevated_albuminuria", # Elevated Albuminuria flag (UACR ≥30)
  "albuminuria_cat",    # Albuminuria category (A1/A2/A3)
  "na_u",               # Urine Sodium
  "urine_osm",          # Urine Osmolality
  # 24-hour urine
  "u24_vl",             # 24hr urine volume (mL)
  "u24_mab",            # 24hr urine microalbumin (mcg/24hr)
  "u24_na",             # 24hr urine sodium (nmol/L)
  "u24_gluc"            # 24hr urine glucose (mg/dL) [from IVGTT]
)


# ── Blood / Serum Labs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
blood_labs <- c(
  # Glucose / insulin metabolism
  "glucose",            # Serum Glucose
  "hba1c",              # HbA1c (%)
  "fasting_insulin",    # Fasting Insulin
  "cpeptide",           # C-Peptide
  "homa_ir",            # HOMA-IR
  "igf_free",           # Free IGF-1
  "igf1_z_score",       # IGF-1 Z-score
  # Kidney function
  "creatinine_s",       # Serum Creatinine (mg/dL)
  "cystatin_c_s",       # Cystatin C (mg/L)
  "bun_s",              # BUN (mg/dL)
  "na_s",               # Serum Sodium
  # Lipids
  "cholesterol",        # Total Cholesterol (mmol/L)
  "hdl",                # HDL (mg/dL)
  "ldl",                # LDL (mg/dL)
  "triglycerides",      # Triglycerides (mg/dL)
  # CBC / hematology
  "hemoglobin",         # Hemoglobin (g/dL)
  "hematocrit",         # Hematocrit
  # Liver panel
  "gotast_base",        # AST (U/L)
  "gptalt_base",        # ALT (U/L)
  "alkphos_base",       # Alkaline Phosphatase (U/L)
  "bili_base",          # Total Bilirubin (mg/dL)
  "alb_base",           # Albumin (g/dL)
  "tot_protein",        # Total Protein
  # Basic metabolic panel
  "bicarb_base",        # Bicarbonate/HCO3 (nmol/L)
  "ca_base",            # Calcium (mg/dL)
  "cl_base",            # Chloride (nmol/L)
  "k_base",             # Potassium (nmol/L)
  "sodium_base",        # Sodium (baseline)
  # Hormones (from IVGTT/endocrine)
  "lh",                 # LH (mIU/mL)
  "fsh",                # FSH (mIU/mL)
  "bl_androst",         # Androstenedione (ng/dL)
  "bl_dheas",           # DHEA-S (ng/dL)
  # Other biomarkers
  "copeptin"            # Copeptin
)


# ── eGFR Equations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
egfr_vars <- c(
  "eGFR_CKD_epi",         # eGFR by CKD-EPI Creatinine 2021
  "eGFR_fas_cr",           # eGFR by Full Age Spectrum (Scr)
  "eGFR_fas_cr_cysc",      # eGFR by Full Age Spectrum (Scr + CysC)
  "eGFR_bedside_Schwartz", # eGFR by Schwartz Bedside Equation (pediatric)
  "eGFR_Schwartz",         # eGFR by Schwartz Full Equation (pediatric)
  "eGFR_Zap"               # eGFR by Zappitelli Equation (pediatric)
)


# ── Renal Clearance Testing (iohexol/PAH) ───────────────────────────────────
renal_clearance <- c(
  # GFR (measured)
  "gfr_bsa_plasma",         # BSA-indexed GFR — plasma clearance (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "gfr_bsa_plasma_urine",   # BSA-indexed GFR — plasma+urine clearance (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "gfr_raw_plasma",         # GFR from plasma clearance (mL/min, absolute)
  "gfr_raw_plasma_urine",   # GFR from plasma+urine clearance (mL/min, absolute)
  "gfr_ecv_std",            # GFR standardized by ECV
  "gfr_ecv_percent",        # GFR/ECV (%)
  "ecv",                    # Extracellular Volume
  # GFR period-by-period (clearance periods)
  "gfr_p1",                 # GFR — Period 1
  "gfr_p2",                 # GFR — Period 2
  "gfr_sd",                 # GFR SD (between periods)
  "gfr_cv",                 # GFR CV (between periods)
  # ERPF / PAH clearance (effective renal plasma flow)
  "erpf_bsa_plasma",        # BSA-indexed ERPF — plasma clearance (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "erpf_bsa_plasma_urine",  # BSA-indexed ERPF — plasma+urine clearance (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "erpf_raw_plasma",        # ERPF from plasma clearance (mL/min)
  "erpf_raw_plasma_urine",  # ERPF from plasma+urine clearance (mL/min)
  "pah_bsa",                # BSA-normalized PAH clearance (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "pah_bsa_plasma_urine",   # BSA-normalized PAH clearance plasma+urine (mL/min/1.73m²)
  "pah_clear_abs",          # Absolute PAH clearance (mL/min)
  "pah_clear_bsa",          # BSA-normalized PAH clearance (plasma)
  "pahcl_12_8mgmin",        # Raw PAH clearance (plasma)
  "pah_p1",                 # PAH clearance — Period 1
  "pah_p2",                 # PAH clearance — Period 2
  "pah_raw",                # Mean raw PAH (mL/min)
  "pah_sd",                 # PAH SD
  "pah_cv",                 # PAH CV
  "rbf",                    # Renal Blood Flow
  # Derived hemodynamic parameters
  "ff",                     # Filtration Fraction (GFR/ERPF)
  "ra",                     # Afferent arteriolar resistance
  "re",                     # Efferent arteriolar resistance
  "rvr",                    # Renal Vascular Resistance
  "pg",                     # Pi G (oncotic pressure)
  "deltapf",                # Filtration pressure across glomerular capillaries
  "glomerular_pressure",    # Glomerular capillary pressure (mmHg)
  "kfg",                    # Kfg (ultrafiltration coefficient)
  "cm",                     # Plasma protein mean concentration
  # Clearance agent volumes / procedural
  "avg_plasma_iohexol",     # Average plasma iohexol concentration (ug/mL)
  "avg_plasma_pah",         # Average plasma PAH concentration (ug/mL)
  "plasma_ioh_1",           # Plasma iohexol — Period 1
  "plasma_ioh_2",           # Plasma iohexol — Period 2
  "plasma_pah_1",           # Plasma PAH — Period 1
  "plasma_pah_2",           # Plasma PAH — Period 2
  "iohexol_urine_150",      # Urine iohexol concentration (T=+150)
  "iohexol_urine_180",      # Urine iohexol concentration (T=+180)
  "pah_urine_120",          # Urine PAH concentration (T=+120)
  "pah_urine_150",          # Urine PAH concentration (T=+150)
  "urineflow_1",            # Urine flow rate — Period 1 (mL/min)
  "urineflow_2"             # Urine flow rate — Period 2 (mL/min)
)


# ── BOLD / ASL MRI (Kidney Oxygenation) ─────────────────────────────────────
# Naming convention: bold_{L/R}_{bl/pf}_{cortex/medulla}
#   bl = baseline (pre-furosemide), pf = post-furosemide
bold_mri <- c(
  # Left kidney — baseline
  "bold_l_bl_cortex",   # L cortex R2* baseline (s⁻¹)
  "bold_l_bl_medulla",  # L medulla R2* baseline (s⁻¹)
  # Right kidney — baseline
  "bold_r_bl_cortex",   # R cortex R2* baseline (s⁻¹)
  "bold_r_bl_medulla",  # R medulla R2* baseline (s⁻¹)
  # Left kidney — post-furosemide
  "bold_l_pf_cortex",   # L cortex R2* post-furosemide (s⁻¹)
  "bold_l_pf_medulla",  # L medulla R2* post-furosemide (s⁻¹)
  # Right kidney — post-furosemide
  "bold_r_pf_cortex",   # R cortex R2* post-furosemide (s⁻¹)
  "bold_r_pf_medulla",  # R medulla R2* post-furosemide (s⁻¹)
  # Change scores (furosemide response)
  "bold_l_change_cortex",   # L cortex ΔR2* (pf - bl)
  "bold_r_change_cortex",   # R cortex ΔR2* (pf - bl)
  "bold_l_change_medulla",  # L medulla ΔR2* (pf - bl)
  "bold_r_change_medulla",  # R medulla ΔR2* (pf - bl)
  # Averages
  "avg_k_r2",   # Average kidney R2* (from renal clearance form)
  "avg_c_r2",   # Average cortical R2*
  "avg_m_r2",   # Average medullary R2*
  # FSOC (Fractional renal tissue oxygenation — from BOLD voxelwise)
  "fsoc_l_cortex",   # Left cortex FSOC
  "fsoc_r_cortex",   # Right cortex FSOC
  "fsoc_l_medulla",  # Left medulla FSOC
  "fsoc_r_medulla",  # Right medulla FSOC
  "fsoc_l_kidney",   # Left kidney FSOC (whole)
  "fsoc_r_kidney",    # Right kidney FSOC (whole)
  "length_left",          # L kidney length (cm)
  "length_right",         # R kidney length (cm)
  "depth_left",           # L kidney depth (cm)
  "depth_right",          # R kidney depth (cm)
  "width_left",           # L kidney width (cm)
  "width_right",          # R kidney width (cm)
  "vol_left",             # L kidney volume (mL)
  "vol_right",            # R kidney volume (mL)
  "volume_left",          # L kidney volume — outcomes form (mL)
  "volume_right",         # R kidney volume — outcomes form (mL)
  "volume_left_manual",   # L kidney volume — manually measured (mL)
  "volume_right_manual",  # R kidney volume — manually measured (mL)
  "tkv",                  # Total Kidney Volume (cm³)
  "tkv_outcomes",         # TKV from outcomes form
  "httkv"                 # Height-adjusted TKV
)

# Voxelwise BOLD data (one row per voxel — use separately for imaging analyses)
bold_mri_voxelwise <- c(
  "vox_r2star",      # Voxel R2* value
  "vox_region",      # Voxel region label (cortex/medulla)
  "vox_side",        # Kidney side (L/R)
  "vox_x", "vox_y", "vox_z"  # Voxel coordinates
)


# ── Cardiac / Abdominal MRI (PC-MRI + cine) ─────────────────────────────────
cardiac_mri <- c(
  # Cardiac structure / function
  "lvedv",           # LV end-diastolic volume (mL)
  "lvesv",           # LV end-systolic volume (mL)
  "lvsv",            # LV stroke volume (mL)
  "lvef",            # LV ejection fraction (%)
  "lv_mass",         # LV mass (g)
  "lv_mass_i",       # LV mass index (g/m²)
  "rvedv",           # RV end-diastolic volume (mL)
  "rvesv",           # RV end-systolic volume (mL)
  "rvsv",            # RV stroke volume (mL)
  "rvef",            # RV ejection fraction (%)
  # Phase-contrast MRI (flow)
  "aorta_qp_qs",     # Aorta Qp/Qs
  "co",              # Cardiac output (L/min)
  "ci",              # Cardiac index (L/min/m²)
  "sv",              # Stroke volume
  "hr_mri",          # Heart rate during MRI
  # Fat / tissue compartments (abdominal MRI)
  "hepatic_ff",      # Hepatic fat fraction (MRI/MRS)
  "total_liver_volume_ml",  # Total liver volume (mL)
  "pericardial_fat", # Pericardial fat volume
  "vat_volume",      # Visceral adipose tissue volume (mL)
  "sat_volume",      # Subcutaneous adipose tissue volume (mL)
  "pancreas_volume", # Pancreas volume (mL)
  "pancreatic_ff",   # Pancreatic fat fraction
  # Vascular stiffness (from sphygmocor / PWV)
  "pwv",             # Pulse wave velocity (m/s)
  "augmentation_index", # Augmentation index (%)
  "bsa"              # Body surface area (cardiac MRI form)
)


# ── DXA (Dual-energy X-ray Absorptiometry) ──────────────────────────────────
dxa <- c(
  "dexa_body_fat",            # Body fat percentage (%)
  "dexa_lean_mass",           # Lean mass percentage (%)
  "dexa_lean_kg",             # Lean mass (kg)
  "dexa_fat_kg",              # Fat mass (kg)
  "dexa_trunk_mass",          # Trunk mass percentage (%)
  "dexa_trunk_kg",            # Trunk mass (kg)
  "dexa_ag_ratio",            # Android/Gynoid ratio
  "dexa_est_vat",             # Estimated VAT mass (g)
  "dexa_bone_mineral_density" # Bone mineral density (g/cm²)
)


# ── Kidney Biopsy ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
kidney_biopsy <- c(
  # Glomerular morphometry
  "gloms",              # Number of glomeruli (total)
  "gloms_gs",           # Globally sclerotic glomeruli (%)
  "glom_volume_con",    # Glomerular volume — consensus method (10⁶ µm³)
  "glom_volume_weibel", # Glomerular volume — Weibel method (10⁶ µm³)
  "glom_volume_wiggins",# Glomerular volume — Wiggins method (10⁶ µm³)
  "glom_tuft_area",     # Glomerular tuft area (µm²)
  "glom_nuc_count",     # Glomerular nuclear count
  # Interstitial / tubular
  "fia",                # Fractional interstitial area
  # Podocyte / glomerular injury (if present)
  "acan",               # ACAN score
  "acan_sev",            # ACAN severity
  "kit_id", "cryostor_id"
)


# ── Liver Biopsy (PET-derived; bx vars not yet in current extract) ──────────
# Note: liver biopsy pathology vars (bx_date_liver, steatosis, etc.) are in
# the data dictionary but not in this extract. PET-derived liver kinetics are:
liver_pet <- c(
  "liver_k1",           # Liver K1 (PET tracer influx rate constant)
  "liver_k2",           # Liver K2
  "liver_k3",           # Liver K3
  "liver_vb",           # Liver vascular fraction (PET)
  "total_liver_volume_ml", # Total liver volume (mL)
  "hepatic_ff"          # Hepatic fat fraction
)


# ── PET Scan ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pet_scan <- c(
  "cpm1",               # PET CPM (sample 1)
  "cpm2",               # PET CPM (sample 2)
  "ki_cortex_l",        # Tracer uptake — L cortex Ki
  "ki_cortex_r",        # Tracer uptake — R cortex Ki
  "ki_medulla_l",       # Tracer uptake — L medulla Ki
  "ki_medulla_r",       # Tracer uptake — R medulla Ki
  "ki_kidney_l",        # Tracer uptake — L kidney Ki
  "ki_kidney_r",        # Tracer uptake — R kidney Ki
  "avg_c_k1",
  "avg_k_k1",
  "avg_c_k2",
  "avg_k_k2",
  "avg_c_f",
  "avg_k_f"
)

# ── Hyperglycaemic / Euglycaemic Clamp ──────────────────────────────────────
# Summary outcomes only (exclude raw time-series glucose_0, glucose_5, etc.)
clamp_outcomes <- c(
  # Insulin secretion (hyperglycaemic clamp / IVGTT)
  "airg",               # Acute Insulin Response to Glucose (hyperglycaemic clamp)
  "acprg",              # Acute C-Peptide Response to Glucose
  "di",                 # Disposition Index (AIRg × Si)
  "acpr",               # ACPR (from CRC sub-study)
  "acpr_max",           # ACPR max
  "air",                # AIR (CRC sub-study)
  "air_max",            # AIR max
  "ss_c_pep",           # Steady State C-Peptide Response
  "ss_insulin_response",# Steady State Insulin Response
  "steady_state_cpeptide", # Steady State C-Peptide (clamp)
  "steady_state_insulin",  # Steady State Insulin (clamp)
  # Insulin sensitivity (euglycaemic clamp)
  "adipose_ir",         # Adipose IR (fasting insulin × fasting FFA)
  "adipo_ir_mmol_l_pmol_l", # ADIPO-IR (mmol/L / pmol/L units)
  "adipo_ir_meq_l_iu_ml",   # ADIPO-IR (mEq/L / µIU/mL units)
  "search_eis",         # Estimated Insulin Sensitivity
  "homa_ir",            # HOMA-IR
  # M-values (glucose disposal — euglycaemic clamp)
  "mval",               # M-value (mg/kg/min)
  "m_i",                # M/I ratio
  "p1_raw_m",           # Phase 1: Raw M-value (mg/kg/min)
  "p1_raw_leanm",       # Phase 1: Raw M-value indexed to lean mass
  "p1_gc_m",            # Phase 1: Glucose-corrected M-value
  "p1_gc_leanm",        # Phase 1: GC M-value indexed to lean mass
  "p2_raw_m",           # Phase 2: Raw M-value
  "p2_raw_leanm",       # Phase 2: Raw M-value indexed to lean mass
  "p2_gc_m",            # Phase 2: GC M-value
  "p2_gc_leanm",        # Phase 2: GC M-value indexed to lean mass
  # FFA suppression (lipolysis during clamp)
  "fasting_ffa",        # Fasting FFA
  "baseline_ffa",       # Baseline FFA (avg)
  "ffa_suppression",    # FFA Suppression (%)
  "ffa_suppression_combined",  # FFA Suppression (combined across studies)
  "p1_ffa_suppression", # Phase 1: FFA suppression
  "p1_steady_state_ffa",# Phase 1: Steady state FFA
  "p2_ffa_suppression", # Phase 2: FFA suppression
  "p2_steady_state_ffa",# Phase 2: Steady state FFA
  # Baseline labs (clamp visit)
  "fbg",                # Fasting Blood Glucose (mg/dL)
  "fasting_insulin",    # Fasting Insulin
  # Insulin clearance
  "ins_clear",          # Insulin Clearance
  "early_ins_clear",    # Early-Phase Insulin Clearance
  "fasting_insulin_clearance_ng_ml_uiu_l"  # Fasting Insulin Clearance
)

# Raw clamp time-series (use for AUC calculations, curve fitting)
# Format: glucose_0, glucose_5 ... glucose_270; insulin_0 ... insulin_270; etc.
clamp_timeseries_prefixes <- c(
  "glucose_",     # Blood glucose at each timepoint
  "insulin_",     # Insulin at each timepoint
  "cpeptide_",    # C-peptide at each timepoint
  "ffa_",         # Free fatty acids at each timepoint
  "d20_infusion_rate_"  # D20 infusion rate at each timepoint
)
# To get all time-series vars:
# clamp_ts_vars <- grep(paste(clamp_timeseries_prefixes, collapse="|"), names(df), value=TRUE)


# ── IVGTT (Intravenous Glucose Tolerance Test — MinMod) ─────────────────────
ivgtt <- c(
  # MinMod-derived outcomes
  "mm_si",       # Insulin Sensitivity (Si)
  "mm_airg",     # AIRg (Acute Insulin Response to Glucose)
  "mm_di",       # Disposition Index
  "mm_ir",       # Insulin Resistance
  "mm_bcell",    # Beta Cell Function
  "mm_sg",       # Glucose Effectiveness (Sg, min⁻¹)
  "mm_gb",       # Basal Glucose (mg/dL)
  "mm_ib",       # Basal Insulin (µU/mL)
  "mm_r2",       # MinMod R-squared (goodness of fit)
  # Endocrine labs drawn during IVGTT
  "lh",          # LH (mIU/mL)
  "fsh",         # FSH (mIU/mL)
  "igf1_z_score",# IGF-1 Z-score
  "bl_androst",  # Androstenedione (ng/dL)
  "bl_dheas"     # DHEA-S (ng/dL)
)


# ── MMTT + Metabolic Cart (Mixed Meal Tolerance Test) ───────────────────────
mmtt_outcomes <- c(
  # AUC summary outcomes
  "glucose_auc",     # Blood glucose AUC (0–240 min)
  "insulin_auc",     # Insulin AUC
  "cpeptide_auc",    # C-Peptide AUC
  # Insulin clearance
  "early_phase_insulin_clearance",  # Early-phase insulin clearance (0–60 min)
  "late_insulin_clearance",         # Late-phase insulin clearance (60–240 min)
  "total_insulin_clearance",        # Total insulin clearance (0–240 min)
  # Indirect calorimetry — Baseline (resting metabolic rate)
  "brmr_ree",        # Resting Energy Expenditure (kcal/day)
  "brmr_rq",         # Respiratory Quotient (baseline)
  "brmr_vo2_l",      # VO2 baseline (L/min)
  "brmr_vco2",       # VCO2 baseline (L/min)
  "brmr_fo",         # Fat Oxidation (baseline)
  "brmr_co",         # Carbohydrate Oxidation (baseline)
  "ree_bw",          # REE / body weight
  "ree_ffm",         # REE / fat-free mass
  # Indirect calorimetry — Post-meal (60 min stimulated)
  "srmr_ree",        # REE (60 min)
  "srmr_rq",         # RQ (60 min)
  "srmr_vo2_l",      # VO2 (60 min, L/min)
  "srmr_co2",        # VCO2 (60 min, L/min)
  "srmr_fo",         # Fat Oxidation (60 min)
  "srmr_co",         # Carbohydrate Oxidation (60 min)
  "ree_bw_60min",    # REE/BW at 60 min
  # Insulin sensitivity / adipose IR
  "adipo_ir_mmol_l_pmol_l",  # ADIPO-IR (mmol/L / pmol/L)
  "adipo_ir_meq_l_iu_ml",    # ADIPO-IR (mEq/L / µIU/mL)
  "steady_state_ffa"         # Steady state FFA
)

# MMTT time-series (one row per timepoint per subject)
# Analytes: glucose, insulin, cpeptide, glp1, glucagon, ffa, yy (peptide YY)
# Timepoints: -10, 0, 10, 30, 45, 60, 120, 180, 240
mmtt_timeseries_prefixes <- c(
  "glucose_",    # Blood glucose at each MMTT timepoint
  "insulin_",    # Insulin at each MMTT timepoint
  "cpeptide_",   # C-peptide
  "glp1_",       # GLP-1
  "glucagon_",   # Glucagon
  "ffa_",        # Free fatty acids
  "yy_"          # Peptide YY
)


# ── Omics (Serum / Urine / Tissue) ──────────────────────────────────────────
# Note: proteomics (SomaScan), Nightingale NMR, and lipidomics vars are in
# the data dictionary but stored in long format / separate files.
# The variable name prefixes below identify them in the wide dataset.

# Proteomics (SomaScan) — seq_XXXXX_XX naming
# Blood proteomics (seq_ + digits only, no _urine suffix)
proteomics_blood_pattern  <- "seq.10000.28"
# To extract: grep(proteomics_blood_pattern, names(df), value = TRUE)

# Urine proteomics (seq_ + digits + _urine suffix)
proteomics_urine_pattern  <- "seq.10000.28_urine"
# To extract: grep("^seq_", names(df), value = TRUE)

# Lipidomics — ~1278 vars in the data
lipidomics_prefix <- c("lpc_", "pc_", "pe_", "sm_", "cer_", "dg_", "tg_", "mg_",
                        "lpe_", "fa_", "hex_", "lac_")
# To extract: grep(paste(lipidomics_prefix, collapse="|"), names(df), value=TRUE)

# Nightingale NMR metabolomics (serum) — not in current extract, stored separately
# Metabolomics (urine/plasma, untargeted)
metabolomics_prefix <- c("az_", "met_")

# Key named metabolomics / NMR outcomes (when available in wide format):
nmr_metabolomics <- c(
  # Nightingale NMR lipoproteins (examples — full list ~250 vars)
  "xxl_vldl_p",   # XXL-VLDL particle concentration
  "ldl_d",        # LDL particle diameter
  "hdl_d",        # HDL particle diameter
  "gp_",          # Glycoprotein acetyls (GlycA/GlycB)
  "glucose_nmr",  # NMR glucose
  "lactate",      # Lactate
  "citrate",      # Citrate
  "glutamine"     # Glutamine
)

has_any <- function(df, vars) {
  vars_present <- intersect(vars, names(df))
  if (length(vars_present) == 0) return(rep(FALSE, nrow(df)))
  rowSums(!is.na(df[, vars_present, drop = FALSE])) > 0
}


# ── Main function ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_procedure_flags <- function(df) {

  # ── Clamp time-series vars (pulled by pattern, not fixed list) ──────────────
  clamp_ts_vars <- grep("^(glucose|insulin|cpeptide|ffa|d20_infusion_rate)_\\d",
                        names(df), value = TRUE)

  # ── MMTT time-series vars ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  mmtt_ts_vars  <- grep("^(glucose|insulin|cpeptide|glp1|glucagon|ffa|yy)_\\d",
                        names(df), value = TRUE)

  # ── SomaScan proteomics (when present) ──────────────────────────────────────
  prot_blood_vars <- grep("^seq_\\d+_\\d+$",      names(df), value = TRUE)
  prot_urine_vars <- grep("^seq_\\d+_\\d+_urine$", names(df), value = TRUE)

  # ── Lipidomics ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  lipid_vars <- grep(
    "^(lpc|pc|pe|sm|cer|dg|tg|mg|lpe|fa|hex|lac)_",
    names(df), value = TRUE
  )

  # ── Urine metabolomics (Astrozeneca) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  az_metab_vars <- grep("^az_", names(df), value = TRUE)

  # ── Add flags ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(

      # Demographics / vitals
      flag_vitals          = has_any(df, vitals_anthropometrics),

      # Lab procedures
      flag_urine_labs      = has_any(df, urine_labs),
      flag_blood_labs      = has_any(df, blood_labs),
      flag_egfr            = has_any(df, egfr_vars),

      # Imaging
      flag_bold_mri        = has_any(df, bold_mri),
      flag_cardiac_mri     = has_any(df, cardiac_mri),
      flag_dxa             = has_any(df, dxa),
      flag_kidney_pet        = has_any(df, pet_scan),

      # Renal physiology
      flag_renal_clearance = has_any(df, renal_clearance),

      # Metabolic testing
      flag_clamp           = has_any(df, c(clamp_outcomes, clamp_ts_vars)),
      flag_ivgtt           = has_any(df, ivgtt),
      flag_mmtt            = has_any(df, c(mmtt_outcomes, mmtt_ts_vars)),

      # Biopsy
      flag_kidney_biopsy   = has_any(df, kidney_biopsy),
      flag_liver_pet       = has_any(df, liver_pet),

      # Omics
      flag_proteomics_blood  = has_any(df, proteomics_blood_pattern),
      flag_proteomics_urine  = has_any(df, proteomics_urine_pattern),
      flag_lipidomics        = has_any(df, lipid_vars),
      flag_urine_metabolomics = has_any(df, az_metab_vars)

    )

  df
}


# ── Summary helper: count flags per study ────────────────────────────────────
summarise_procedure_flags <- function(df) {
  flag_cols <- grep("^flag_", names(df), value = TRUE)

  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(study) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(record_id),
      dplyr::across(
        dplyr::all_of(flag_cols),
        ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        .names = "{.col}"
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # Rename flag_ columns to drop prefix for readability
    dplyr::rename_with(~ sub("^flag_", "n_", .x), dplyr::starts_with("flag_"))
}

# ── Summary helper: count flags per study ────────────────────────────────────
summarise_procedure_flags <- function(df) {
  flag_cols <- grep("^flag_", names(df), value = TRUE)

  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(study) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(record_id),
      dplyr::across(
        dplyr::all_of(flag_cols),
        ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        .names = "{.col}"
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # Rename flag_ columns to drop prefix for readability
    dplyr::rename_with(~ sub("^flag_", "n_", .x), dplyr::starts_with("flag_"))
}


```

```{r}
harm_dat_recid <- add_procedure_flags(harm_dat_recid)
harm_dat_recid_flag <- harm_dat_recid %>%
  select(record_id, study, visit, starts_with("flag_"))

flag_cols <- grep("^flag_", names(harm_dat_recid_flag), value = TRUE)

summary_df <- harm_dat_recid %>%

  dplyr::group_by(study, study_design, visit) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n_distinct(record_id),
    dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(flag_cols), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols      = dplyr::all_of(flag_cols),
    names_to  = "procedure",
    values_to = "n_with_data"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    pct       = round(100 * n_with_data / n),
    procedure = sub("^flag_", "", procedure),
    procedure = gsub("_", " ", procedure)
  ) %>%
  mutate()

summary_df %>%
  filter(visit == "baseline") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = procedure, y = interaction(study, study_design), color = ifelse(n_with_data > 0, "Available", "NA"))) +
  geom_point(size = 8) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("NA" = "white", 
                                "Available" = "#588157")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)

harm_dat_recid %>%
  dplyr::group_by(study, study_design, visit) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n_distinct(record_id),
    dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(flag_cols), ~ sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
  gt() %>%
  tab_spanner(columns = c(flag_blood_labs, flag_urine_labs),
              label = "labs")

```

```{r}
# ── 1. Variable lists per procedure domain ────────────────────────────────────
cols <- names(harm_dat_recid)

blood_labs <- intersect(c(
  "glucose","hba1c","fasting_insulin","cpeptide","homa_ir","creatinine_s",
  "cystatin_c_s","bun_s","na_s","cholesterol","hdl","ldl","triglycerides",
  "hemoglobin","hematocrit","gotast_base","gptalt_base","alkphos_base",
  "bili_base","alb_base","tot_protein","bicarb_base","ca_base","cl_base",
  "k_base","sodium_base","lh","fsh","bl_androst","bl_dheas","copeptin",
  "igf1_z_score","alb","alk_phos","bili","bun","bg"
), cols)

urine_labs <- intersect(c(
  "creatinine_u","microalbumin_u","acr_u","elevated_albuminuria",
  "albuminuria_cat","na_u","urine_osm","u24_vl","u24_mab","u24_na",
  "u24_gluc","acr"
), cols)

clamp_outcomes <- intersect(c(
  "m_value","gir","m_ffm","hepatic_glucose_output","steady_state_glucose",
  "steady_state_insulin","glucose_infusion_rate_ss","endogenous_glucose_production",
  "hgc_bg_ss","hgc_insulin_ss","hgc_gir_ss","hgc_cpeptide_ss"
), cols)
clamp_ts_vars <- grep("^(glucose|insulin|cpeptide|ffa|d20_infusion_rate)_\\d",
                      cols, value = TRUE)
clamp_all <- unique(c(clamp_outcomes, clamp_ts_vars))

renal_clearance <- intersect(c(
  "gfr_bsa_plasma","gfr_bsa_plasma_urine","gfr_raw_plasma","gfr_raw_plasma_urine",
  "gfr_ecv_std","erpf_bsa_plasma","erpf_bsa_plasma_urine","erpf_raw_plasma",
  "erpf_raw_plasma_urine","rbf","ff","ra","re","rvr","pg","deltapf",
  "glomerular_pressure","kfg","gfr_p1","gfr_p2","pah_bsa","pah_raw",
  "plasma_ioh_1","plasma_ioh_2"
), cols)

bold_mri <- intersect(c(
  "bold_l_bl_cortex","bold_l_bl_medulla","bold_r_bl_cortex","bold_r_bl_medulla",
  "bold_l_pf_cortex","bold_l_pf_medulla","bold_r_pf_cortex","bold_r_pf_medulla",
  "avg_k_r2","avg_c_r2","avg_m_r2","fsoc_l_cortex","fsoc_r_cortex",
  "left_cortex_ox_metab_mean","right_cortex_ox_metab_mean"
), cols)

dxa <- intersect(c(
  "dexa_body_fat","dexa_lean_mass","dexa_lean_kg","dexa_fat_kg","dexa_trunk_mass",
  "dexa_trunk_kg","dexa_ag_ratio","dexa_est_vat","dexa_bone_mineral_density"
), cols)

kidney_bx <- intersect(c(
  "gloms","gloms_gs","glom_volume_con","glom_volume_weibel","glom_volume_wiggins",
  "glom_tuft_area","glom_nuc_count","fia","acan"
), cols)

cardiac_mri <- intersect(c(
  "lvedv","lvedvi","lvesv","lvesvi","lvef","lvsv","lv_myo_mass_dias",
  "lv_myo_mass_syst","lv_cardiac_output","lv_cardiac_index","lv_stroke_volume",
  "rvedv","rvef","rvsv","cardiac_output","ef_percent","edv_ml","esv_ml",
  "sv_ml","lved_mass","lved_massi"
), cols)

kidney_size_vars <- intersect(c(
  "left_kidney_volume_ml","right_kidney_volume_ml","volume_left_manual",
  "volume_right_manual","length_left","length_right","httkv",
  "left_kidney_length","right_kidney_length","total_kidney_volume"
), cols)
kidney_perf_vars <- grep("^(pcasl|pasl|asl).*_(left|right)", cols, value = TRUE)
kidney_mri_all   <- unique(c(kidney_size_vars, kidney_perf_vars, bold_mri))

# lipidomics: lipid species columns
lipid_vars <- grep("^(lpc|pc|pe|sm|cer|dg|tg_|mg|lpe|fa_|hex|lac)_",
                   cols, value = TRUE)

# proteomics (not in current extract — patterns retained for completeness)
prot_blood_vars <- intersect(c("seq.10000.28"), cols)
prot_urine_vars <-intersect(c("seq.10000.28_urine"), cols)

# ── 2. Helper: does a study have ≥1 non-missing value in a domain? ─────────
has_any <- function(study_name, varlist) {
  present <- intersect(varlist, cols)
  if (length(present) == 0) return(FALSE)
  sub <- harm_dat_recid[!is.na(harm_dat_recid$study) & harm_dat_recid$study == study_name, present, drop = FALSE]
  any(rowSums(!is.na(sub)) > 0)
}

# ── 3. Build procedure matrix for studies present in the data ─────────────
studies_in_data <- sort(unique(na.omit(harm_dat_recid$study)))

proc_matrix <- lapply(studies_in_data, function(s) {
  sub   <- harm_dat_recid[!is.na(harm_dat_recid$study) & harm_dat_recid$study == s, ]
  sd   <- unique(sub$study_design)
  n_pts <- length(unique(subset(sub, visit == "baseline")$record_id))
  groups <- sort(unique(na.omit(sub$group)))

  list(
    study           = s,
    n               = n_pts,
    groups          = groups,
    study_design    = sd,
    intervention    = unique(sub$intervention),
    visits          = unique(subset(sub, visit != "baseline")$visit),
    blood_labs      = has_any(s, blood_labs),
    urine_labs      = has_any(s, urine_labs),
    clamp           = has_any(s, clamp_all),
    renal_clear     = has_any(s, renal_clearance),
    bold_mri        = has_any(s, bold_mri),
    dxa             = has_any(s, dxa),
    kidney_bx       = has_any(s, kidney_bx),
    cardiac_mri     = has_any(s, cardiac_mri),
    kidney_mri      = has_any(s, kidney_mri_all),
    lipidomics      = has_any(s, lipid_vars),
    blood_proteomics      = has_any(s, prot_blood_vars),
    urine_proteomics      = has_any(s, prot_urine_vars)
  )
})

proc_harm_dat_recid <- bind_rows(lapply(proc_matrix, function(x) {
  as.data.frame(x[names(x) %nin% c("groups", "visits")], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})) %>%
  mutate(kidney_bx = case_when(study %in% c("ATTEMPT", "RPC2") ~ T, T ~ kidney_bx),
         intervention = case_when(is.na(intervention) ~ "", T ~ intervention))

# Add cohort string
groups_list <- lapply(proc_matrix, `[[`, "groups")
names(groups_list) <- proc_harm_dat_recid$study

visits_list <- lapply(proc_matrix, `[[`, "visits")
names(visits_list) <- proc_harm_dat_recid$study
visits_list$COFFEE <- "WK1"

# Map group labels to abbreviations
abbrev_group <- function(g) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Type 1",  g, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T1D",
    grepl("Type 2",  g, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "T2D",
    grepl("^Lean",   g, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HC",
    grepl("^Obese",  g, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "OB",
    grepl("PKD|ADPKD", g, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "ADPKD",
    TRUE ~ g
  )
}

# Map visit labels to abbreviations
abbrev_visit <- function(v) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("baseline",   v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "0",
    grepl("4_weeks_post",  v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "MO1",
    grepl("3_months_post_surgery",  v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "MO3",
    grepl("4_months_post",  v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "MO4",
    grepl("12_months_post_surgery", v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "YR1",
    grepl("year_1",  v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "YR1",
    grepl("year_2", v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "YR2",
    grepl("year_3",  v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "YR3",
    grepl("year_4", v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "YR4",
    grepl("follow up", v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "WK1",
    grepl("post_treatment", v, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "MO6",
    TRUE ~ v
  )
}

# ── 4. HTML helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cohort_colors <- c(
  T1D   = "#e77c76",
  T2D   = "#e37902",
  HC    = "#8cb369",
  OB    = "#5b8e7d",
  ADPKD = "#bc4b51"
)

visit_colors <- c(
  `0`   = "#d6ccc2",
  `WK1` = "#f8ad9d", 
  `MO1`   = "#ff9e00",
  `MO3`    = "#ff9100",
  `MO4`    = "#ff8500",
  `MO6` = "#ff6d00",
  `YR1`   = "#64a4ce",
  `YR2`    = "#4893c6",
  `YR3`    = "#2d82bd",
  `YR4` = "#2476b1"
)

badge_html <- function(label) {
  bg <- cohort_colors[label]
  if (is.na(bg)) bg <- "#9ca3af"
  sprintf(
    paste0('<span style="background:%s;color:white;font-size:0.68em;font-weight:600;',
           'padding:2px 7px;border-radius:999px;margin:1px 2px;',
           'display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;line-height:1.7">%s</span>'),
    bg, label
  )
}

badge_visit_html <- function(label) {
  bg <- visit_colors[label]
  if (is.na(bg)) bg <- "#9ca3af"
  sprintf(
    paste0('<span style="background:%s;color:white;font-size:0.68em;font-weight:600;',
           'padding:2px 7px;border-radius:999px;margin:1px 2px;',
           'display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;line-height:1.7">%s</span>'),
    bg, label
  )
}

make_cohort_html <- function(study_name) {
  gs   <- groups_list[[study_name]]
  abbr <- unique(abbrev_group(gs))
  paste(vapply(abbr, badge_html, character(1)), collapse = "")
}

make_visit_html <- function(study_name) {
  vs   <- visits_list[[study_name]]
  abbr <- sort(unique(abbrev_visit(vs)))
  paste(vapply(abbr, badge_visit_html, character(1)), collapse = "")
}

dot_yes <- '<span style="color:#cb1b16;font-size:2em;">&#9679;</span>'
dot_no  <- '<span style="color:#d1d5db;font-size:2em;">&#9675;</span>'
dot     <- function(x) ifelse(x, dot_yes, dot_no)

# ── 5. Assemble display data frame ────────────────────────────────────────────
display_harm_dat_recid <- proc_harm_dat_recid |>
  mutate(
    cohorts_html = sapply(study, make_cohort_html),
    visits_html = sapply(study, make_visit_html),
    across(c(blood_labs, urine_labs, clamp, renal_clear, bold_mri, dxa,
             kidney_bx, cardiac_mri, kidney_mri, lipidomics, blood_proteomics, urine_proteomics),
           ~ sapply(.x, dot))
  ) |>
  select(study, study_design, intervention, cohorts_html, visits_html, n,
         blood_labs, urine_labs, clamp, renal_clear,
         bold_mri, dxa, kidney_bx, cardiac_mri, kidney_mri,
         lipidomics, blood_proteomics, urine_proteomics) |>
  arrange(study_design)

# ── 6. Build gt table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
study_gt_table <- display_harm_dat_recid |>
  gt(id = "harm-study-table") |>
  
  cols_label(
    study        = "STUDY",
    study_design = "STUDY DESIGN",
    intervention = "EXPOSURE",
    visits_html = "VISITS",
    cohorts_html = "COHORTS",
    n            = "N AT BASE LINE",
    blood_labs   = "BLOOD LABS",
    urine_labs   = "URINE LABS",
    clamp        = "CLAMP",
    renal_clear  = "RENAL CLEARANCE",
    bold_mri     = "BOLD MRI",
    dxa          = "DXA",
    kidney_bx    = "KIDNEY BX",
    cardiac_mri  = "CARDIAC MRI",
    kidney_mri   = "KIDNEY MRI",
    lipidomics   = "LIPIDOMICS",
    blood_proteomics   = "BLOOD PROTEOMICS",
    urine_proteomics = "URINE PROTEOMICS"
  ) |>
  
  fmt_markdown(columns = everything()) |>
  
  # Study name: bold
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold", size = "15px"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = study)
  ) |>
  
  # Column headers: uppercase, small, bold
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(
      weight = "bold", size = "12px",
      transform = "uppercase", color = "#374151"
    ),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) |>
  
  # N: right-aligned, muted
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(color = "#6b7280", weight = "600")),
    locations = cells_body(columns = n)
  ) |>
  
  # Procedure columns: center
  cols_align(align = "center",
             columns = c(blood_labs, urine_labs, clamp, renal_clear,
                         bold_mri, dxa, kidney_bx, cardiac_mri,
                         kidney_mri, lipidomics, blood_proteomics, urine_proteomics)) |>
  cols_align(align = "right",  columns = n) |>
  
  # Column widths
  cols_width(
    study        ~ px(145),
    study_design ~ px(150),
    visits_html ~ px(120),
    intervention ~ px(150),
    cohorts_html ~ px(120),
    n            ~ px(40),
    blood_labs   ~ px(68),
    urine_labs   ~ px(68),
    clamp        ~ px(58),
    renal_clear  ~ px(78),
    bold_mri     ~ px(65),
    dxa          ~ px(48),
    kidney_bx    ~ px(68),
    cardiac_mri  ~ px(72),
    kidney_mri   ~ px(72),
    lipidomics   ~ px(72),
    blood_proteomics   ~ px(72),
    urine_proteomics   ~ px(72)
  )

# ── 7. View / save ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
study_gt_table


```

# List of studies

## Cross-sectional, obeservational
* RENAL-HEIR
* RENAL-HEIRitage
* CROCODILE
* SWEETHEART
* CASPER
* PENGUIN

## Longitudinal (Interventional)
* ULTRA-T2D
* IMST
* COFFEE

## Accelerated longitudinal
* PANTHER

## Longitudinal (Observational)
* ADAPT-CKD
* PANDA
* IMPROVE-T2D
* MANGO

## RCT
* ATTEMPT
* RPC2
* MANATEE-T1D
* SUGAR-N-SALT
* T1-DISCO
* MetMod-T1D
* OTTER
